common.nameLong: Blood on the Clocktower Ledger Viewer

footer.notAffiliated: This town be not in league with The Pandemonium Institute.
footer.descriptionsNotice: Character likenesses and descriptions be belongin' to Steven Medway and The Pandemonium Institute.
footer.translatedByMachine: Some speakin' in this town were spoken by a mechanical siren. Help replace the siren's song by {link}postin' a note to the Hub o' Git{/link}.
footer.translatedByCommunity: More words set right from the {externalLink}scallywags spreadsheet{/externalLink}.

script.title: {title}
script.wikiLabel: Lay eyes on {title} on the wiki
script.nightOrderWarning: The followin' stations be mentioned in the rousin' list, but they don't be listed on the ledger: {characters}

home.description: An unofficial website for viewing {externalLink}Blood on the Clocktower{/externalLink} scripts in your browser.
home.clickToUpload: Click to hoist Jason's ledger or drag the thing here.

base3.title: Base 3
base3.description: Ledgers by the admiralty at The Pandemonium Institute.

carousel.title: Carousel Cache
carousel.description: Ledgers chosen by the admirals to show off the stations released in the Carousel.

wc25.title: World Cup 2025
wc25.description: Ledgers in the 2025 World Cup competition with special rules that change the game.

s2.title: Streamer's Stockpile
s2.description: A pile of ledgers from some of yer favourite Clocktower streamers and their crews that uses many of the stations available since the Carousel was released!

v.title: Sundry Booty
v.description: Ledgers I've plundered on me travels. This ain't in any way a “best of” list.

month.title: Ledger o' the Month
month.description: The featured ledger o' the month in the admiral's own app.

errors.notFoundDescription: Scour the URL, or go {link}back to port{/link}.
